what_it_does: June 9, 2026 The @dp.update flow decorator in Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines lets you add an update flow that writes to a sink in update output mode, emitting only the rows that change in each batch. Unlike append flows, update flows support stateful aggregations without requiring a watermark.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
